creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
6627df30d767a97692778adbc7f579172fc787ce fixes this, although it wasn't called out explicitly (its focus was on other things and fixed this as a side effect). At least the included example compiles w/o errors.

It hasn't been MFC'd. The one part of it that fixes it could be, though.

Though I am making a note in cdefs.9 about this situation.
